input_dict.question: In between J Puttanna Kanagal and John Cassavetes, who acted in many Hollywood films, notably "Rosemary's Baby"?
input_dict.target_summary: From summary_1: "John Cassavetes — Passage [1]." Supporting second-hop evidence (John Cassavetes): "John Nicholas Cassavetes ( ; December 9, 1929 – February 3, 1989) was a Greek-American actor, film director, and screenwriter." and "He also acted in many Hollywood films, notably \"Rosemary's Baby\" (1968) and \"The Dirty Dozen\" (1967)."
